Class ClaimRepository

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.db.repositories.ClaimRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
IClaimRepository
public class ClaimRepository extends Object implements IClaimRepository
JDBI-backed implementation of IClaimRepository.

All blocking DB calls are dispatched to the shared database executor so the main thread is never blocked. All queries are scoped to serverId.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClaimRepository

      public ClaimRepository(org.jdbi.v3.core.Jdbi jdbi, ExecutorService executor, String serverId)
      Parameters:
      jdbi - the JDBI instance for database access
      executor - the shared database executor for async dispatch
      serverId - the server identifier used to scope all queries

  • Method Details

    • insertClaim

      public CompletableFuture<Void> insertClaim(ClaimModel model)
      Description copied from interface: IClaimRepository
      Persists a new territory claim.
      Specified by:
      insertClaim in interface IClaimRepository
      Parameters:
      model - the claim to insert
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is written

    • insertClaims

      public CompletableFuture<Void> insertClaims(List<ClaimModel> claims)
      Description copied from interface: IClaimRepository
      Persists many claims in a single transaction.
      Specified by:
      insertClaims in interface IClaimRepository
      Parameters:
      claims - the claims to insert; a no-op if empty
      Returns:
      a future that completes when all rows are written

    • deleteClaim

      public CompletableFuture<Void> deleteClaim(String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Description copied from interface: IClaimRepository
      Deletes the claim for a specific chunk.
      Specified by:
      deleteClaim in interface IClaimRepository
      Parameters:
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the row is deleted

    • deleteAllClaimsForClan

      public CompletableFuture<Void> deleteAllClaimsForClan(UUID clanId)
      Description copied from interface: IClaimRepository
      Deletes all claims owned by a clan. Used when a clan is disbanded.
      Specified by:
      deleteAllClaimsForClan in interface IClaimRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan's UUID
      Returns:
      a future that completes when all rows are deleted

    • findClaimByChunk

      public CompletableFuture<Optional<ClaimModel>> findClaimByChunk(String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Specified by:
      findClaimByChunk in interface IClaimRepository
      Parameters:
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      Returns:
      a future of the claim, or empty if the chunk is unclaimed

    • findClaimsByClan

      public CompletableFuture<List<ClaimModel>> findClaimsByClan(UUID clanId)
      Specified by:
      findClaimsByClan in interface IClaimRepository
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of all claims owned by this clan

    • findAllClaims

      public CompletableFuture<List<ClaimModel>> findAllClaims()
      Specified by:
      findAllClaims in interface IClaimRepository
      Returns:
      a future of all claims across all clans
